headline: Regulators Unite to Oversee $130B Stablecoin Market

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 5% Below $66K Amid Renewed Strikes

headline: Nippon, Sherwin-Williams Abort $30B Akzo Nobel Bid

article.title: Nippon Paint, Sherwin-Williams End Effort to Buy Akzo Nobel
article.summary: Nippon Paint Holdings Co. and Sherwin-Williams Co. ended their effort to buy Akzo Nobel NV, leaving the Dutch paintmaker to proceed with its planned merger with US firm Axalta Coating Systems Ltd.

article.title: India Central Bank Says Report on Selling Gold Is Incorrect
article.summary: India’s central bank said a report that it’s selling gold is “not correct,” pointing to data showing its physical stock of gold has remained unchanged.
